---
title: "tangent_project_spd"
generated: true
description: "Map SPD matrices into the tangent space at `reference`."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.linalg.spd`](../nitrix-linalg-spd.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:tangent_project_spd -->
```python
tangent_project_spd(input: Float[Array, '... d d'], reference: Float[Array, '... d d'], *, psi: float = 0.0, key: Optional[jax.Array] = None, eigvalue_clip: EigvalueClip = 'auto') -> Float[Array, '... d d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:tangent_project_spd -->
Map SPD matrices into the tangent space at `reference`.

Computes $\log(R^{-1/2} X R^{-1/2})$, where $R$ is the
reference and $X$ the input.  This is the affine-invariant
Riemannian log map at the reference point; the log-Euclidean
approximation $\log(X) - \log(R)$ is *not* what this returns.

Use this to convert a batch of SPD matrices (e.g. subject covariance
matrices) into a flat tangent-space representation suitable for
downstream linear-model fitting.  [`cone_project_spd`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/cone_project_spd.qmd) inverts the
map.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:tangent_project_spd -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `input` | `Float` | `...` √ó `d` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | Symmetric (assumed SPD) matrix batch to project into the tangent space. |
| `reference` | `Float` | `...` √ó `d` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | Symmetric (assumed SPD) reference point at which the tangent space is taken, broadcastable against `input`. |
| `psi` | `float` | ‚Äî | `0.0` | Reconditioning strength forwarded to [`sympower`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/sympower.qmd) and [`symlog`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symlog.qmd). |
| `key` | `Optional[jax.Array]` | ‚Äî | `None` | PRNG key, required when `psi > 0`. |
| `eigvalue_clip` | `EigvalueClip` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | Eigenvalue clipping policy forwarded to [`sympower`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/sympower.qmd) and [`symlog`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symlog.qmd). |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `d` √ó `d`. The symmetric tangent-space representation of each input matrix at `reference`; same shape as `input`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:tangent_project_spd -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **9.01 ms** (median, L4); up to **32.08√ó faster** than `nilearn.tangent`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_TANGENT_PROJECT_SPD.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=32,d=256 | `cupy.eigh_tangent` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=32,d=256 | `nilearn.tangent` | ok | 241.97 ms / 246.21 ms | 1.177 s | 768 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0042√ótol | 1.09x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=32,d=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 222.53 ms / 332.85 ms | 743.70 ms | 771 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00097√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=32,d=256 | `cupy.eigh_tangent` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=32,d=256 | `nilearn.tangent` | ok | 229.31 ms / 231.23 ms | 795.14 ms | 8.65 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0042√ótol | 25.49x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=32,d=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 9.00 ms / 9.01 ms | 1.048 s | 126.09 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0009√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=64,d=128 | `cupy.eigh_tangent` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=64,d=128 | `nilearn.tangent` | ok | 108.22 ms / 130.10 ms | 730.79 ms | 768 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0038√ótol | 1.03x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=64,d=128 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 104.83 ms / 154.46 ms | 393.66 ms | 768 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00074√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=64,d=128 | `cupy.eigh_tangent` | compile_error | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=64,d=128 | `nilearn.tangent` | ok | 149.98 ms / 186.28 ms | 1.010 s | 4.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0038√ótol | 32.08x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=64,d=128 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 4.68 ms / 4.73 ms | 1.291 s | 104.92 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00063√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=64,d=64 | `cupy.eigh_tangent` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=64,d=64 | `nilearn.tangent` | ok | 27.38 ms / 31.34 ms | 3.141 s | 768 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0016√ótol | 1.35x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cpu | b=64,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 20.35 ms / 25.18 ms | 340.98 ms | 768 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0006√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=64,d=64 | `cupy.eigh_tangent` | compile_error | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=64,d=64 | `nilearn.tangent` | ok | 26.44 ms / 27.02 ms | 601.61 ms | 1.06 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0016√ótol | 15.04x vs nitrix-jax |
| tangent_project_spd | jax-cuda12 | b=64,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.76 ms / 1.82 ms | 1.165 s | 74.47 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00064√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `f8a8b86b` ¬∑ nitrix `f04ec509`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:tangent_project_spd -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
